elements.name: Title
texts: "He who bathes, no Stygian flood need fear."

elements.name: Description
texts: "Spirituum hic thermae, his Lethaea piacula : qui se Balneat hic, Stygii non timer amnis aquas / Here souls may bathe : Lethe's atonements here : And he who bathes, no Stygian flood need fear."

elements.name: Source
texts: Petrus Cadellus, Sacerdos Hibernus, quoted in Messingham's Florilegium (1624), Leslie, Shane, Saint Patrick's Purgatory: A Record from History and Literature, p. v

elements.name: Publisher
texts: Burns Oats and Washbourne Ltd, London

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: "Spirituum hic thermae, his Lethaea piacula : qui se Balneat hic, Stygii non timer amnis aquas / Here souls may bathe : Lethe's atonements here : And he who bathes, no Stygian flood need fear."
